(module 14_file_write_status
  (extern defun file_write ((path : Str) (body : Str)) : Num @capability "file.write")

  (defun save_status ((path : Str) (count : Num)) : Num
    (def body : Str (str.join "" (arr.new Str "OK count=" (str.from_num count))))
    (file_write path body))

  (test returns_write_code
    (mocks (file.write "/tmp/s.txt" 1))
    (assert-eq (save_status "/tmp/s.txt" 7) 1))

  (test zero_count
    (mocks (file.write "/tmp/s.txt" 1))
    (assert-eq (save_status "/tmp/s.txt" 0) 1))

  (sys.stdout.write (save_status (sys.input.get 0) (str.to_num (sys.input.get 1)))))

le.write")

  (defun copy_file ((src : Str) (dst : Str)) : Num
    (let ((content (file_read src)))
      (do
        (file_write dst content)
        (str.length content))))

  (test copies_five
    (mocks (file.read  "/src.txt" "hello")
           (file.write "/dst.txt" "hello" 1))
    (assert-eq (copy_file "/src.txt" "/dst.txt") 5))

  (test copies_empty
    (mocks (file.read  "/src.txt" "")
           (file.write "/dst.txt" "" 1))
    (assert-eq (copy_file "/src.txt" "/dst.txt") 0))

  (test copies_long
    (mocks (file.read  "/src.txt" "abcdefghijklmnopqrst")
           (file.write "/dst.txt" "abcdefghijklmnopqrst" 1))
    (assert-eq (copy_file "/src.txt" "/dst.txt") 20))

  (sys.stdout.write
    (str.from_num
      (copy_file
        (sys.input.get 0)
        (sys.input.get 1))))
